title: Renewal of a license
doc_html:
§2120.17. Renewal of a license

            At least thirty days prior to license expiration, the licensee shall submit an application which meets the requirements of this Part for renewal of the license. If the application is approved, the license shall be renewed for an additional two-year period.

            Acts 2022, No. 577, §1.
doc_text:
§2120.17.  Renewal of a license
At least thirty days prior to license expiration, the licensee shall submit an application
which meets the requirements of this Part for renewal of the license.  If the application is
approved, the license shall be renewed for an additional two-year period.
Acts 2022, No. 577, §1.
